state_item.subject: Team standup moved
state_item.body: Hi team, starting next week the daily standup will move from 9:30 to 10:00 AM to accommodate the London office. Please update your calendars.

state_item.subject: Benefits open enrollment reminder
state_item.body: Open enrollment for 2025 benefits starts Monday May 5th and closes May 16th. Log into the benefits portal to review your options. Contact hr@techcorp.com with questions.

state_item.subject: Code review request - PR #287
state_item.body: Hey, I pushed the refactored authentication module to PR #287. Could you review it when you get a chance? The main changes are in auth/token_manager.py and auth/session.py. No rush, but before Thursday would be great.

state_item.subject: DevWeekly #194: Rust in production, new React features
state_item.body: This week: How Stripe migrated 30% of their services to Rust. React 20 introduces server components by default. PostgreSQL 18 beta benchmarks show 40% improvement on analytical queries. Read more at devweekly.io/194

state_item.subject: Scheduled maintenance: CI/CD pipeline
state_item.body: The CI/CD pipeline will undergo maintenance this Saturday from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM UTC. All builds queued during this window will be delayed. Please plan merges accordingly.

state_item.subject: Q2 sprint planning doc
state_item.body: I've shared the Q2 sprint planning document in Confluence. Please add your team's capacity estimates by Friday. Link: confluence.techcorp.com/q2-sprint-planning

state_item.subject: Office parking lot resurfacing
state_item.body: Sections B and C of the east parking lot will be closed May 1-3 for resurfacing. Please use the west lot or street parking during this time. Shuttle service will run from the overflow lot every 15 minutes.

state_item.subject: Lunch and learn: Intro to Kubernetes
state_item.body: Reminder: I'm hosting a lunch and learn on Kubernetes basics this Wednesday at noon in the Maple conference room. Pizza will be provided. RSVP here: forms.techcorp.com/k8s-lunch

state_item.subject: Mandatory phishing awareness training
state_item.body: All employees must complete the annual phishing awareness training by May 15th. Access the course at training.techcorp.com/phishing-2025. Completion is tracked automatically. Contact security@techcorp.com if you have issues.

state_item.subject: API rate limiting discussion
state_item.body: Following up on our chat yesterday -- I wrote up a proposal for the new rate limiting strategy. It's in the shared Google Doc. Main idea: token bucket per API key with burst allowance. Let me know your thoughts before the architecture review.

state_item.subject: Release notes v2.2.7 published
state_item.body: Release notes for v2.2.7 are now live on our changelog. Key updates: fixed race condition in session handler, added bulk export endpoint, improved search relevance scoring. Full notes: changelog.techcorp.com/v2.2.7

state_item.subject: Engineering all-hands recap
state_item.body: For those who missed the all-hands: hiring 8 new engineers in Q2, new office opening in Austin, platform reliability target raised to 99.95%, and a shout-out to the payments team for zero-downtime migration. Recording available on the internal portal.

state_item.subject: VPN client update required by May 5
state_item.body: A critical security patch for the corporate VPN client is available. Please update to version 4.8.2 before May 5th. After that date, older versions will be blocked from connecting. Download: it.techcorp.com/vpn-update. Restart required after install.

state_item.subject: Kudos: You were recognized by a teammate!
state_item.body: Congratulations! Lisa Chen gave you a kudos: 'Thanks for staying late to help debug the production issue on Friday. Your knowledge of the caching layer saved us hours of downtime. True team player!' View all your kudos at recognition.techcorp.com.

state_item.subject: New course available: Advanced observability with OpenTelemetry
state_item.body: A new self-paced course is available on the learning platform: Advanced Observability with OpenTelemetry. Covers distributed tracing, custom metrics, log correlation, and dashboard creation. Estimated time: 4 hours. Enroll at learning.techcorp.com/otel-advanced.

state_item.subject: Earth Day initiative - office composting program
state_item.body: Starting May 1st, we're launching an office composting program on floors 3-5. Green bins will be placed in kitchen areas for food scraps. Quick guide attached. Volunteers for the green ambassador program can sign up at forms.techcorp.com/green-ambassador.

state_item.subject: Load test results: search service v2
state_item.body:
Completed load testing for search service v2. Results:
- Throughput: 12,400 req/s (target: 10,000) - PASS
- p50 latency: 45ms, p99: 210ms (target p99 < 250ms) - PASS
- Error rate under load: 0.02% - PASS
- Memory stable at 2.1GB after 1hr sustained load
Recommendation: ready for production.

state_item.subject: Women in Engineering meetup - May 8
state_item.body: Join us for the monthly Women in Engineering meetup on May 8th at 5:30pm in the Oak room. This month's topic: navigating the IC to Staff Engineer path. Guest speaker: Priya Sharma (Staff Engineer, Platform). Snacks provided. Allies welcome!

state_item.subject: On-call rotation update - May schedule
state_item.body: May on-call schedule is posted. Your shift: May 12-18 (primary), May 26-June 1 (secondary). Reminder: swap requests must be submitted 48 hours in advance via PagerDuty. Escalation contacts and runbooks updated at wiki.techcorp.com/oncall-may.

state_item.subject: Engineering blog - call for authors
state_item.body: We're relaunching the engineering blog and looking for authors. Topics: system design challenges, scaling stories, open source contributions, developer tooling. We'll provide editorial support and each published post earns a $200 bonus. Interested? Reply with a topic idea.

state_item.subject: Hackathon for Good - Sign up by May 9
state_item.body: Join the annual Hackathon for Good on May 16-17! Build solutions for local nonprofits in 24 hours. Teams of 3-5. This year's partners: City Food Bank, Youth STEM Alliance, and Habitat for Humanity. Sign up at forms.techcorp.com/hackathon-good-2025. Dinner and snacks provided.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Search for emails with 'deadline' in the subject.

state_item.subject: Deadline reminder: API docs
state_item.body: Friendly reminder that the API documentation update is due by end of day Friday. Please push your changes to the docs repo.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Send an email to project-mgr@techcorp.com with subject 'API docs update' and body 'Will have the docs ready by Thursday EOD.'

state_item.subject: New feature flag system
state_item.body: We've rolled out a new feature flag system. All new features should use it. Documentation: docs.techcorp.com/feature-flags. Training session Friday at 3 PM.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Forward email e_probe_31 to backend-team@techcorp.com with comment 'Everyone should attend the Friday training.'

state_item.subject: Company hackathon sign-up
state_item.body: Annual company hackathon is May 15-16. Sign up your team (2-5 people) at hackathon.techcorp.com by May 8. Theme: Developer Experience.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Delete email e_probe_32 since I already signed up for the hackathon.

state_item.subject: Elevator maintenance notice
state_item.body: Elevators 2 and 3 will be under maintenance May 1-2. Please use elevator 1 or stairs during this period.

state_item.subject: Password rotation reminder
state_item.body: Your corporate password expires in 7 days. Please update it at identity.techcorp.com. Requirements: 12+ chars, uppercase, number, special char.

state_item.subject: Weekend deployment checklist
state_item.body: Deployment window: Saturday 2 AM - 6 AM UTC. Services affected: API gateway, payment processor, user auth. Rollback plan and on-call contacts listed below.
